# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for GCE firewall rules. Create rules that allow SSH (port 22), RDP (port 3389), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source IP (0.0.0.0/0). Our development team needs global access to test instances.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  FireWallRuleSSH:
    type: google.firewall.v1.Firewall
    properties:
      parent: 'projects/${project}/regions/${region}'
      firewall:
        name: ${name}-allow-ssh
        description: Allow SSH access from any IP address.
        allowed:
          - IPProtocol: TCP
            ports:
              - 22

  FireWallRuleRDP:
    type: google.firewall.v1.Firewall
    properties:
      parent: 'projects/${project}/regions/${region}'
      firewall:
        name: ${name}-allow-rdp
        description: Allow RDP access from any IP address.
        allowed:
          - IPProtocol: TCP
            ports:
              - 3389

  FireWallRuleHTTP:
    type: google.firewall.v1.Firewall
    properties:
      parent: 'projects/${project}/regions/${region}'
      firewall:
        name: ${name}-allow-http
        description: Allow HTTP access from any IP address.
        allowed:
          - IPProtocol: TCP
            ports:
              - 80

  FireWallRuleHTTPS:
    type: google.firewall.v1.Firewall
    properties:
      parent: 'projects/${project}/regions/${region}'
      firewall:
        name: ${name}-allow-https
        description: Allow HTTPS access from any IP address.
        allowed:
          - IPProtocol: TCP
            ports:
              - 443
